detail: gate_reason uses only pre-specified robustness diagnostics
feature_robustness_summary.csv omits K_Y/K_G quantiles; they stay in separate stability appendices
all-spec kernel outputs contain only output, spending and feature-profile fields
gate excludes K_Y>0, K_G>0 and positive kernel-stability filters
robustness summary does not keep unused positive-sign diagnostics
No output-only BIC or fit ranking is part of gate logic.
raw p-values, Bonferroni p-values and Benjamini-Hochberg q-values are written as sensitivity diagnostics
target rows removed by country/profile-year filter; targets=POL_2022_target; min_distance_to_pol=0.000000000
failed rows use failed_* reason labels
